items.title: Što bih volio da mi je netko rekao prije nego sam ušao u IT prodaju
items.summary: U najnovijoj kolumni direktor poslovnog razvoja i voditelj outband tima u Infinumu Marko Knežević donosi lekcije koje je stekao radeći u IT prodaji.

items.title: Actress Cate Blanchett launches a free registry tool to keep AI from using your likeness
items.summary: The actor and MEP Eva Maydell revealed RSL Media’s Human Consent Registry at the European Parliament, a tool that lets anyone set the terms on which AI can use their name, face and voice.
